privacy.message: Your interaction data is processed locally. Your data is never stored on our servers.

header.title: Your Path to Safety
header.subtitle: Based on our analysis of your medication combination, here are the recommended next steps to ensure your safety and well-being.

1.title: STOP Taking These Together
1.desc: These medications should never be combined. Stop taking both and seek immediate medical attention.

2.title: Contact Your Doctor
2.desc: Call your prescribing physician or healthcare provider immediately to discuss alternative options.

3.title: Seek Emergency Care
3.desc: If you are currently taking both medications, consider visiting an urgent care or emergency department.

1.title: Consult Your Physician
1.desc: Schedule an appointment with your doctor immediately to discuss this interaction and possible alternatives.

2.title: Do Not Stop Abruptly
2.desc: Do not stop taking any medications without medical supervision. Some medications require gradual discontinuation.

3.title: Consider Alternatives
3.desc: Ask your doctor about safer alternatives that achieve the same therapeutic goals without the interaction risk.

1.title: Monitor for Symptoms
1.desc: Pay close attention to any unusual symptoms or side effects while taking these medications together.

2.title: Consider Timing Separation
2.desc: Ask your pharmacist if taking these medications at different times of day could reduce the interaction risk.

3.title: Schedule a Review
3.desc: Schedule a medication review with your doctor or pharmacist within the next week to discuss this combination.

1.title: Be Aware
1.desc: While generally safe, be aware of any mild side effects that may occur from this combination.

2.title: Regular Monitoring
2.desc: Continue with your regular check-ups. Inform your doctor about all medications you are taking.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This analysis is for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider before making any changes to your medication regimen. If you are experiencing any adverse effects, seek medical attention immediately.

noData.title: No Data Provided
noData.message: No medications were provided for analysis. Please go back to the intake form and add at least 2 medications.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to Dose-Wise. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our prescription drug interaction analyzer service.

personalInfo.subtitle: 2.1 Personal Information
personalInfo.desc: We may collect the following personal information when you use Dose-Wise:
items: Name and contact information
Age and gender
Medical conditions and health information
List of medications you are taking

prescriptionData.subtitle: 2.2 Prescription Data
prescriptionData.desc: If you upload prescription images or documents, we process these to extract medication information. Uploaded images are processed and not permanently stored on our servers.

usageData.subtitle: 2.3 Usage Data
usageData.desc: We may collect information about how you access and use our service, including your IP address, browser type, pages visited, and time spent on pages.

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.desc: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: To provide and maintain our drug interaction analysis service
To analyze prescriptions and extract medication information
To generate personalized drug interaction reports
To notify you about changes to our service
To provide customer support
To monitor the usage of our service
To detect, prevent, and address technical issues

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: The security of your data is important to us. We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure and we cannot guarantee absolute security. All data transmission is encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS encryption.

dataRetention.title: 5. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We will retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. Prescription images are processed in real-time and are not stored on our servers after processing is complete.

disclosure.title: 6. Disclosure of Data
disclosure.desc: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal identification information to third parties. We may disclose your data in the following situations:
items: To comply with a legal obligation
To protect and defend the rights or property of Dose-Wise
To prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the service
To protect the personal safety of users of the service or the public
To protect against legal liability

thirdParty.title: 7. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may employ third-party companies and individuals to facilitate our service, provide service on our behalf, perform service-related services, or assist us in analyzing how our service is used. These third parties have access to your personal data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights
yourRights.desc: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal data, including:
items: The right to access the personal data we hold about you
The right to request correction of inaccurate data
The right to request deletion of your personal data
The right to object to or restrict processing of your data
The right to data portability
The right to withdraw consent

childrensPrivacy.title: 9. Children's Privacy
childrensPrivacy.content: Our service is not intended for use by children under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 18. If you are a parent or guardian and you are aware that your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us so that we can take necessary action.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
items: Email: privacy@dosewise.com
Website: www.dosewise.com
